specific_mechanism: Allosteric enzymes shift between R and T states; binding at one site cooperatively modifies affinity at distant sites; Hill coefficient quantifies cooperativity
llm_application: LLM adapter composition with cooperative effects: stack LoRA adapters such that activating one site cooperatively modifies the effective rank at distant layers; Hill-coefficient analog for adapter interaction strength.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes enzymology topological-defect mapping as proposed.
